name: Ellowen Calliope
description:
“W-Who are you?! A thief?!”

As Ellowen walked through the library in her house, in the distance, she saw a bright, almost blinding light.

As the light went out and she got closer, Ellowen saw a woman who looked younger than her standing near a shelf, looking equally confused.

And, Ellowen didn't fail to notice that this woman looked very different than her, from her clothes to her appearance.

Image credits: I don't remember exactly who it was, so if you know, let me know!
creator: Falha S2
